target.post_title: STELLAR THC Strawberries & Cream Bar | Mohawk Medibles
target.post_content:
**Buy STELLAR THC Strawberries & Cream Chocolate Bar online in Canada at Mohawk Medibles**, your trusted Indigenous-owned cannabis dispensary. Shop this extraordinary strawberry edible and enjoy fast Canada-wide shipping with same-day processing. Order now for discreet delivery of this unique, chocolate bar featuring a nice fruit taste and a cream coating. Experience premium cannabis edibles sourced from Tyendinaga Mohawk Territory. -

💡 Usage Guide

Recommended Dosage

  • Beginners: Start with one small piece (approximately 5-10mg THC) and wait at least 2 hours before consuming more
  • Experienced Users: 10-20mg THC per serving, adjusting based on tolerance and desired effects
  • High Tolerance: 25mg+ THC for experienced consumers only

Consumption Tips

  • Start Low, Go Slow: Edibles can take 30-120 minutes to take effect; patience is essential
  • Take with Food: Consuming with a light snack can improve absorption and reduce potential nausea
  • Stay Hydrated: Keep water nearby throughout your experience
  • Plan Ahead: Effects can last 4-8 hours; ensure you have no obligations or responsibilities

Onset & Duration

  • Onset: 30-120 minutes (varies by metabolism, body weight, and recent food intake)
  • Peak Effects: 2-3 hours after onset
  • Duration: 4-8 hours total experience

Best Use Cases

Perfect for long-lasting relaxation and unique flavour exploration. The Strawberry & Cream Bar's fruit-berry profile and soft, chewy texture make it ideal for leisurely evenings, creative pursuits, or social gatherings where you want extended effects. Best enjoyed on days off or during weekend relaxation. The distinctive sour sugar coating and natural pink hue make this an excellent choice for cannabis connoisseurs seeking something truly different. Not recommended before work, driving, or operating machinery.

❓ Frequently Asked Questions

How long does the STELLAR THC Strawberries & Cream Bar take to work?

A: As with all cannabis edibles, the Strawberries & Cream Bar typically takes 30-120 minutes to take effect, depending on your metabolism, body weight, and whether you've eaten recently. Effects can last 4-8 hours, so plan accordingly and start with a small piece if you're new to edibles.

How much THC is in the STELLAR Strawberries & Cream Bar?

A: Each Strawberries & Cream Bar contains clearly marked THC content divided into individual servable pieces. Check the packaging label for exact dosage per piece and total THC content. We recommend starting with one piece and waiting at least 2 hours before consuming more.

Is the Ruby Strawberries & Cream Bar suitable for beginners?

A: Yes, when consumed responsibly. Beginners should start with a single small piece (5-10mg THC) and wait a full 2 hours before considering more. The delicious taste can be tempting, but patience is crucial with edibles. Always start low and go slow.

How should I store the STELLAR Strawberries & Cream Bar?

A: Store your Strawberries & Cream Bar in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight and heat sources. Keep it sealed in its original packaging to maintain freshness and texture. Avoid refrigeration unless in very hot conditions, as this may affect the sour sugar coating. Always keep out of reach of children and pets.

Does Mohawk Medibles ship the Strawberries & Cream Bar across Canada?

A: Yes! We offer fast, discreet Canada-wide shipping with same-day processing on orders placed before 2 PM EST. Your Strawberries & Cream Bar will arrive in plain, unmarked packaging to ensure privacy. All shipments comply with Canadian cannabis regulations.

target.post_title: Burn Triple Threat 9g Disposable THC Vape | Mohawk Medibles
target.post_content:
The Burn Triple Threat 9g THC Disposable Vape is built for users who want maximum capacity, zero hassle, and flavour on demand. To begin with, this powerhouse disposable features three separate chambers, each loaded with 3 grams of premium THC distillate, giving you a massive 9 grams total in one sleek device.

Instead of carrying multiple pens, Burn lets you switch strains instantly 🔄. Simply twist the selector and choose your next flavour—no swapping, no downtime. Because of this triple-chamber design, you can enjoy variety while stretching one vape for weeks.

From the first draw, the experience stays smooth and consistent 💨. Each inhale delivers clean, potent vapor thanks to pure THC distillate blended with real, natural terpenes only. There’s no VG, PG, or MCT, so every hit tastes better and hits harder. At the same time, the inhale-activated design keeps things simple—just draw and go.

As usage continues, the USB-C rechargeable battery ensures you finish every last drop 🔋. With an average of 300–400 pulls per chamber, the full device can deliver 900–1,200 pulls, making it one of the longest-lasting disposables available.

Despite its size, the Burn Triple Threat stays discreet, pocket-safe, and travel-ready, perfect for daily carry. Whether you’re at home or on the move, this vape is always ready when you are.

⚡ Why You’ll Love It

  • 🔥 9 grams total THC oil (3× standard capacity)

  • 🔄 Twist-to-select chamber for instant flavour changes

  • 🔋 USB-C rechargeable battery

  • 🌿 Pure THC distillate + natural terpenes only

  • 🚫 No VG, PG, or MCT

  • 💨 Inhale-activated, button-free draws

  • 🧪 Lab-tested for potency & cleanliness

🧠 What to Expect

  • Smooth, steady hits with 2–3 second draws

  • Long-lasting performance without flavour drop-off

  • Consistent vapor output until the final pull

  • Powerful effects suited for experienced users

🛠️ How to Use

  1. Click the power button 5 times to turn the device on or off

  2. Twist the selector to choose your chamber

  3. Take a slow 2–3 second draw

  4. Recharge using a USB-C cable (not included)

target.post_title: Zealousy LA Mousse Hash | Mohawk Medibles
target.post_content:
Zealousy LA Mousse Hash brings together modern hybrid genetics and premium French Touch craftsmanship for a refined, versatile hash experience. To start, this balanced hybrid comes from the flavorful cross of Jealousy × Zoap, a pairing known for complexity, smooth potency, and layered terpene expression.

Right away, the effects feel even and controlled 🧠✨. First, a gentle mental lift improves mood and sharpens awareness. Focus feels easier, thoughts stay calm, and stress begins to fade. Soon after, a light body relaxation follows, smoothing out tension without dragging you down. Because of this balance, Zealousy works well for both daytime and early evening sessions.

As the experience continues, the high remains steady and functional 😌. You stay clear-headed yet relaxed, making this hash a great option for social settings, creative work, or simply staying present while unwinding.

Meanwhile, the flavour profile evolves with every pull 🍬🧀. Sweet, fruity notes lead on the inhale, thanks to its limonene-rich terpene profile. Then, on the exhale, those bright flavours shift into a savory, slightly cheesy finish that adds depth and character. Earthy undertones tie everything together, keeping the smoke smooth and satisfying.

Because this is LA Mousse Hash, the texture stays light, fluffy, and aerated. As a result, it’s easy to handle, melts cleanly, and delivers consistent flavour whether sprinkled into flower or enjoyed on its own.

Styrofoam Cup LA Mousse Hash, also known as MSG, blends bold flavour, strong potency, and premium California craftsmanship into one smooth concentrate. To begin with, this indica-dominant hybrid (70% indica / 30% sativa) comes from the powerful cross of Sunset Sherbet × GMO, a lineage famous for rich terpenes and heavy-hitting effects.

Right from the first pull, the experience opens with a motivating mental lift 🧠⚡. At first, mood improves, stress fades, and focus sharpens slightly. Soon after, that initial energy gives way to a soothing body calm, spreading steadily through the limbs. Because of this transition, Styrofoam Cup works perfectly for easing into the evening without feeling rushed or overwhelmed.

As the session deepens, the indica side takes over 😌🛋️. Muscles loosen, tension melts away, and the body settles into a deeply relaxed state. At higher doses, sedation becomes more noticeable, making this hash especially effective for nighttime use, pain management, or full mental shutdown after long days.

Meanwhile, the flavour profile remains bold and complex 🧀🍋. Sweet, sugary notes lead the way, followed by citrus brightness and a distinct herbal-cheese funk from its GMO genetics. Underneath, earthy and peppery tones add depth, creating a smooth, lingering finish that keeps every hit satisfying.

Because this is LA Mousse Hash, the texture stays light, fluffy, and aerated. As a result, it’s easy to handle, melts cleanly, and delivers consistent flavour whether sprinkled into flower or enjoyed on its own.

target.post_title: Biscotti LA Mousse Hash | Mohawk Medibles
target.post_content:
Biscotti LA Mousse Hash brings together dessert-level flavour and deep indica relaxation in one premium, solventless concentrate. To begin with, this indica-dominant hybrid (80% indica / 20% sativa) is crafted from the legendary Gelato #25 × Girl Scout Cookies × South Florida OG lineage. Because of this elite genetic mix, every session delivers both flavour and full-body calm.

Right away, the experience starts in the mind 🧠✨. First, a gentle cerebral lift eases stress and quiets racing thoughts. Soon after, laughter comes easily and the mood turns light and upbeat. Then, as the high settles in, a soothing body wave rolls through the muscles, helping you fully relax without feeling overwhelming or heavy.

Meanwhile, the flavour steals the show 🍪🔥. Each hit opens with sweet, sugary cookie notes, followed by nutty richness and a warm, spicy finish. Underneath it all, earthy herbal tones keep the smoke smooth and balanced from start to finish.

Because this is LA Mousse Hash, the texture stays light, airy, and easy to work with. As a result, it crumbles effortlessly, melts cleanly, and delivers consistent potency every time. Whether you sprinkle it, roll it, or press it, Biscotti LA Mousse performs beautifully.

✨ Effects You’ll Notice

  • 😌 Deep body relaxation

  • 😄 Giggly, happy uplift

  • 🛋️ Calm, stoney comfort

  • 🌙 Perfect evening unwind

🩺 Commonly Chosen For

  • Stress & anxiety

  • Chronic pain

  • Depression & mood swings

  • End-of-day relaxation

🍬 Flavour Notes

  • Sugary cookie sweetness

  • Nutty dessert tones

  • Warm spice

  • Light herbal earth

🌬️ Aroma Profile

  • Earthy & herbal

  • Sweet cookie dough

  • Fruity undertones

💎 Why Biscotti LA Mousse Hash Stands Out

  • Solventless dry sift LA Mousse hash

  • Light, aerated French Touch texture

  • Dessert-grade flavour profile

  • Strong yet smooth 25% THC potency

  • Ideal for relaxation without couch-lock
